meta.title: ProGo — All Logistics. One Map.
meta.description: ProGo is one shared logistics operating system for carriers, dispatchers, drivers, clients and forwarders. Not another portal — one live platform for vehicles, loads, GPS, statuses, documents, chats and accounting.
meta.ogDescription: One shared logistics operating system for carriers, drivers, dispatchers and clients. Stop jumping between WhatsApp, Excel and customer portals.

hero.paragraph1: Stop switching between customer portals, driver apps, WhatsApp groups, spreadsheets and disconnected CRMs.
hero.paragraph2: ProGo connects carriers, drivers, dispatchers, forwarders and clients in one live operating system.

viewCounter.ariaLabel: Real site views for today and this month

trialBanner.title: Carriers, shippers & producers — <highlight>try ProGo free for 30 days</highlight>
trialBanner.subtitle: Whether you run trucks, move freight or produce goods and need reliable transport — join our platform and see if one live map changes how you work.

points.access: Full access: vehicles, loads, GPS, statuses, documents and team chat
points.stay: Like it? Stay with us and we'll shape the next step together
points.leave: Not a fit? Walk away anytime — no pressure, no traps

trialBanner.ctaHint: Try first · Decide later · Cancel anytime

map.title: Live Operations Map
map.ariaLabel: Live logistics map showing vehicles, loads and SOS
map.screenshotAlt: ProGo platform — live GPS map with fleet menu and filters

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Logistics is overloaded with disconnected systems.
problem.description: Today every company has its own CRM, portal or mobile app. Drivers register in many systems, update statuses in different places and upload documents into separate portals. Dispatchers forget documents, miss statuses and lose hours in WhatsApp, Excel and emails — then penalties and delayed payments follow.

portals.title: Too many customer portals
portals.description: Every client has its own system. Drivers register again and again just to access loads.

status.title: Drivers forget status updates
status.description: Statuses live in WhatsApp, phone calls and separate apps — never in one reliable place.

documents.title: Missing CMR and documents
documents.description: Dispatchers forget uploads. Payments stall when proof of delivery is missing or late.

chat.title: WhatsApp chaos
chat.description: Critical updates disappear in group chats. Nobody knows the latest truth on a load.

excel.title: Excel planning without live status
excel.description: Plans look fine on paper, but the office cannot see what is actually happening on the road.

payment.title: Payment delays and penalties
payment.description: Wrong or late statuses trigger penalties, disputes and delayed settlements.

whyProgo.label: Why ProGo is different
whyProgo.title: Not another portal. One shared operating system.
whyProgo.description: ProGo is not another customer portal or isolated CRM. It is one live platform where carriers, drivers, dispatchers, forwarders and clients work together — without jumping between dozens of systems, WhatsApp groups, Excel files and customer apps.
traditional: Many portals — every client has its own system
WhatsApp chaos — updates lost in group chats
Missing CMR — documents not connected to jobs
Delayed statuses — nobody sees the live truth
progo: One shared map for the whole operation
One live plan connected to real job data
One driver workflow — GPS, status, documents

solution.label: The solution
solution.title: ProGo brings the operation into one shared workspace.
solution.description: One system for everyone: vehicles, loads, GPS, statuses, documents, chats, My Plan, Accounting, SOS and company collaboration. Carriers, dispatchers, drivers, clients and forwarders finally work from the same live platform — not separate tools.

map.title: One map
map.description: Vehicles, loads, hubs and SOS on a single live operations map.

plan.title: One plan
plan.description: Excel-style planning connected to real job data — not static spreadsheets.

driver.title: One driver workflow
driver.description: GPS, statuses and documents in one mobile flow for every driver.

docs.title: One document flow
docs.description: CMR and files attached to each job, visible to everyone who needs them.

messages.title: One chat system
messages.description: Structured communication tied to loads — not scattered WhatsApp threads.

accounting.title: One accounting view
accounting.description: Shared financial rows between owner, client and carrier in one place.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From registration to live operations in four steps.
howItWorks.description: Get your company, fleet and partners connected — then run the full logistics workflow in one system.

1.title: Register your company
1.description: Create your ProGo workspace and set up your logistics operation in minutes.

2.title: Add vehicles, drivers and dispatchers
2.description: Organize your fleet, assign roles and give every team member the right access.

3.title: Connect with carriers, clients or forwarders
3.description: Invite partner companies so everyone works on the same jobs — not separate portals.

4.title: Run jobs, statuses, documents and accounting in one system
4.description: Plan loads, track GPS, update statuses, upload CMR and manage finances — all live.

features.label: Platform features
features.title: Everything your logistics operation needs — in one system.
features.description: Live map, planning, driver workflows, documents, communication, accounting and collaboration — built for real dispatch work, not generic software templates.

map.title: Live Map
map.description: Vehicles, loads, services, hubs and SOS — all visible on one operations map.

plan.title: My Plan
plan.description: Excel-style planning with live job details, assignments and status visibility.

driver.title: Driver App
driver.description: GPS tracking, status updates and document uploads from the road.

docs.title: Documents & CMR
docs.description: Upload and connect files to each job so dispatch and finance always have proof.

messages.title: Chats & Phone Book
messages.description: Structured communication and contacts instead of WhatsApp chaos.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: Shared rows between owner, client and carrier — one financial truth per job.

sos.title: SOS
sos.description: Help on the route when drivers need support fast.

collab.title: Company Collaboration
collab.description: One job visible to connected companies — carriers, forwarders and clients together.

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.description: Vehicles, drivers and dispatchers organized with clear roles and access.

monitor.title: Live Monitor
monitor.description: Office and TV visibility mode for real-time operations awareness.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing. Pay per user group.
pricing.description: All plans include full ProGo functionality. Price depends only on number of users.
pricing.footerText: All plans include {highlight}. Price depends only on number of users.

cta.title: Ready to connect your logistics operations?
cta.description: Join ProGo and replace fragmented portals with one live system for your carriers, drivers, dispatchers and clients.

social.text: Follow ProGo and join the logistics community

contact.title: Talk to the ProGo team
contact.description: Tell us about your logistics operations. We'll help you understand how ProGo can replace fragmented portals with one live platform.
contact.point1: Response within 24 hours on business days.
contact.point2: Demo and onboarding guidance for carriers, shippers and producers.
contact.point3: No spam — your details are only used to answer your inquiry.
